mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id as conversationId, unread_count as unreadCount FROM im_user_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND unread_count > 0

SELECT uc.conversation_id as conversationId, c.last_message_seq as latestSeq FROM im_user_conversation uc LEFT JOIN im_conversation c ON uc.conversation_id = c.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 1 AND c.last_message_seq IS NOT NULL
